description: Retrieval gold set. Each item maps a question to the turn_index values in a given meeting that contain the answer. Used to compute hit-rate@k and MRR. Deliberately small and hand-curated — the point is to make retrieval quality measurable, not to be exhaustive.

cases.question: Did we commit offline mode for Q3?
What action items does Daniel own?
Why did we change the on-call rotation?
What was the root cause of the payment outage?
How long was the customer impact?
What did we decide about config changes going forward?
Which candidate are we advancing to onsite?
What is the concern about the take-home exercise?
